title: Business Development Representative
description: PwC is expanding our Seattle market presence and seeking Business Development Representatives to drive new client acquisition and relationship growth. You'll be part of a world-class consulting firm where your sales and client relationship skills can grow your career. Join us on-site in our Seattle office.
responsibilities: Identify and prospect new business opportunities within assigned market segments
Conduct needs assessments with prospective clients and present tailored consulting solutions
Build and maintain strong relationships with decision-makers and key stakeholders
Collaborate with service teams to develop compelling proposals and pitches
Track pipeline activity and maintain accurate forecasts in CRM systems
Exceed quarterly revenue targets and contribute to team goals

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Marketing, or related field
skills: Proven sales ability with track record of quota attainment
Understanding of consulting services and business solutions
Proficiency with CRM systems and sales tools
Ability to work in a team-oriented environment

benefits: Competitive base salary with performance-based bonus
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
On-site perks including cafeteria and fitness center
